use_cases: Navigating through pages of content in a blog, documentation, or listing interface
Paginating through data tables or search results in SaaS applications
Moving between sections in multi-step forms or wizards
Browsing through image galleries or media collections
Navigating through product listings in e-commerce storefronts
ai_summary: A reusable icon-based pagination component using Radix UI primitives and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Provides standard pagination controls with configurable button variants (default, outline, ghost, secondary) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for easy integration into modern React applications requiring page navigation.
